creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
There is a pending request for a CakePHP 1.3.x port (current devel
	version).  I would like to reorganize the www/cakephp* ports as
	follows to support each of the usable branches and any future
	security patches released for each one:

	cakephp -> cakephp11
	cakephp-devel -> cakephp12
	cakephp13 (new)

Fix: 

N/A
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
